location.office_time_required: at least 3 days per week in-person

level_signals: 5+ years of experience in technical program management
Base pay range $166K-$195K (Zone 1) consistent with Senior IC
Expected to present to senior leaders and shape company-wide privacy programs

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of experience in technical program management or a related role within a technology-focused organization
Ability to understand system design concepts and break down complex technical problems into structured plans
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present clearly to senior stakeholders
Experience building and managing privacy programs with defined milestones, metrics, and reporting processes
Ability to work through ambiguity, prioritize effectively, and deliver results in a high-growth environment

scope.surface: Company-wide privacy program — data governance, data lifecycle management, retention, access controls, regulatory compliance
primary_metrics_inferred: KPIs and delivery timelines for privacy initiatives
core_responsibilities: Define and manage privacy program roadmaps, including milestones, timelines, and measurable outcomes such as KPIs and reporting metrics
Partner with engineering, legal, compliance, and data teams to ensure privacy requirements are clearly defined and implemented in systems and processes
Build and scale programs that support data governance, including data lifecycle management, retention, and access controls
Lead planning and reporting processes, including executive updates and progress tracking across multiple initiatives
Translate complex technical systems into clear plans and documentation to support consistent execution across teams

compensation.equity_form: equity ownership mentioned as part of compensation package

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly stated across three geographic zones
Equity, bonus, and 401(k) matching all mentioned
Clear team mission and scope (privacy embedded across technology and operations)
Role has defined cross-functional partners and concrete deliverables
Best-in-class benefits package described in detail
red_flags: Hybrid role requires at least 3 days per week in-person in New York, NY — fully remote candidates excluded
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned anywhere in the JD
No nice-to-haves listed — hard to gauge what differentiates strong candidates
No credential requirements stated, making baseline education expectations unclear

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior' + comp range + years requirement)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description as retail brokerage / B2C fintech)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not enumerated in JD)
compensation.base_range_usd reported as Zone 1 (New York, NY) since that is the stated role location
ambiguities: JD lists compensation for three zones but the role is based in New York, NY (Zone 1); Zone 2 and Zone 3 ranges are included in the JD but not applicable to this posting's primary location
No explicit mention of visa sponsorship or work authorization requirements — treated as 'unclear'
